Paint Requirements for a Standard Project For a typical three-bedroom home in Australia, here’s a breakdown of paint requirements: Ceiling Paint: Approximately 20 liters, with flat sheen being the most popular. For bathrooms, use mold-resistant or low-sheen paint. Wall Paint: Around 30 liters of low-sheen paint is needed. Woodwork Paint: About 4 to 6 liters.

For bathroom ceilings, we recommend using mold-proof or low-sheen paint to combat moisture and prevent mold growth. For walls, approximately 30 liters of low-sheen paint is often required. When it comes to woodwork, you’ll usually need around 4 to 6 liters. In terms of coverage, one liter of paint typically covers 7 to 10 square meters on previously painted surfaces.

Please note, our interior paint calculator does not factor in ceilings. Be sure to calculate extra paint if you wish to include them in your project. --- Professional House Painters in Sydney ---

Exterior Residential Painting in Sydney Living in Sydney means being prepared for all kinds of weather conditions, and this also applies to the exterior paint you choose for your home. Sydney receives an average of 47 inches of rain annually, with around 143 days of precipitation. This means your exterior house paint needs to be durable enough to withstand the elements, so you won’t need frequent touch-ups or repairs.

Sydney City Wallpapering Services Sydneysiders are known for their unique sense of style, and wallpaper is making a strong comeback in both modern and traditional homes across the city. With Sydney’s varying climate, the wood used in many homes can expand, crack, or warp due to prolonged exposure to sun, rain, and humidity. High humidity levels, especially in coastal areas, also increase the risk of mildew, making it essential for your exterior paint to have strong mildew resistance. When you request a quote for a painting project in Sydney, we carefully consider these climate factors, ensuring that quality, expertise, and durability are prioritized throughout the process.

The cost is based on factors such as the size of the area to be painted, the type of paint used, the condition of the surfaces, and any additional services required. We provide free estimates to assess your specific needs. What preparation is needed before painting. Preparation may include cleaning surfaces, repairing any damage, taping edges, and priming. Our team handles all necessary preparation to ensure a smooth and durable finish. How long will the painting project take.

Do I need to move my furniture before you start. While its helpful to clear the area of small items, we can assist with moving larger furniture and will take precautions to protect your belongings. What is your warranty or guarantee. We offer a warranty on our workmanship and the quality of materials used. Specific details can be discussed during the estimate process.

Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to commonly asked questions about our products and services. What types of painting services do you offer. We offer a range of services, including interior and exterior painting, residential and commercial painting, drywall repair, and decorative finishes in Sydney. How do you determine the cost of a painting project.

The duration depends on the size and complexity of the project. Each painting project varies in duration, typically taking from a few days to several weeks. Factors such as patchwork, number of paint coats, access (especially for multi-story exteriors), and weather can affect timelines. Do you use environmentally friendly paints. Yes, we offer eco-friendly paint options that are low in VOCs (volatile organic compounds) and safe for your home and the environment.
